pairs.question: How many ships named HMS Vanguard were in service with the Royal Navy?
pairs.answer: Eleven ships of the Royal Navy have borne the name HMS Vanguard.

pairs.question: What was the fate of the HMS Vanguard launched in 1586?
pairs.answer: The English ship Vanguard (1586), a 31-gun galleon, was broken up in 1630, with some parts being reused in the next HMS Vanguard.

pairs.question: Which HMS Vanguard was active during the Anglo-Dutch Wars and scuttled in 1667?
pairs.answer: The HMS Vanguard (1631), a 56-gun second rate, was active in the Anglo-Dutch Wars and scuttled in 1667.

pairs.question: Which HMS Vanguard was the only one of its class and launched in 1944?
pairs.answer: HMS Vanguard (23) was a unique battleship, the only one of her class, launched in 1944.

pairs.question: What class of ship was the HMS Vanguard (S28)?
pairs.answer: HMS Vanguard (S28) is a Vanguard-class ballistic missile submarine.
